parsed.recommendation_text: For fast phone charging, the Anker Nano 67W charger is highly recommended. It offers dual USB-C ports for simultaneous fast charging and supports PPS protocol for optimal Android device performance. Despite warming up under full load, its compact design makes it travel-friendly. The Voltix 65W charger is a budget option but has build quality concerns. The Belkin 25W charger, while ultra-compact, lacks the wattage needed for efficient phone charging.
parsed.selection_rationale: Anker Nano's fast-charging capability and brand recognition outweigh its warmth issue.
